spells.name: Sandstorm
spells.description: Summons a blinding sandstorm that reduces enemy attack and defense by 2 for 3 turns.

spells.name: Raise Skeleton
spells.description: Animates fallen enemy soldiers as Skeleton Warriors under your command.

spells.name: Djinn Blessing
spells.description: Blesses a friendly stack, granting them maximum damage rolls for 2 turns.

spells.name: Curse of Khepri
spells.description: Calls down the curse of the scarab god, dealing (spellpower × 5) direct damage to the target stack.

spells.name: Oasis
spells.description: Restores (spellpower × 3) hit points to the target friendly stack.
